## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the end of GrowthX's engagement with Promptfoo and address final steps.](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Promptfoo hired a full-time developer relations staff, eliminating the need for GrowthX's services](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [GrowthX has improved their specialist network to address previous quality/tone issues](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual appreciation for the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [Finance teams will coordinate the details of ending the engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Topics

### Promptfoo's Decision to End Engagement

  - [Hired full-time developer relations staff to handle content, conference coordination, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [New hire eliminates current need for GrowthX's services](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Promptfoo has a niche market, making it challenging for external content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

### GrowthX's Service Improvements

  - [Hired a cybersecurity expert to improve article quality](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Building out specialist network to better match audience needs](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Addressing previous gaps in quality and tone](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Open to future collaboration if Promptfoo needs to outsource SEO or other assets](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### Feedback on GrowthX's Performance

  - [Positive feedback on customer success and delivery](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Praised for organization, communication, and friendliness](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Appreciated GrowthX's efforts to improve based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Challenge: Promptfoo's audience is highly aware of AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

### Current Content Status

  - [14 articles pending review by Promptfoo](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [New DevRel staff will likely review the content](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Engagement Wrap-up Details

  - [Ian (Promptfoo) will be the point of contact for finance-related matters](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Exact end date of engagement to be determined by finance teams and contract details](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [GrowthX will continue syncs until the end of engagement, flexible to async communication if preferred](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Promptfoo's new DevRel to review pending articles](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [GrowthX's finance team to connect with Ian regarding final invoicing and engagement end date](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Continue scheduled syncs until the official end of engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [GrowthX to ensure all deliverables are in the best possible state for handover](https://fathom.video/share/Vx2qGWQekf-s8iAXFyzLTeGzxjie_s8E?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
